## Context

READ FIRST:
- `frontend/plan/30-FRONTEND-OVERVIEW.md` — auth flow diagram
- `backend/src/Core/Dev4All.Application/Features/Auth/Commands/LoginUser/`
- `frontend/plan/32-FRONTEND-AGENT-PROMPTS.md` — find `#F03` section

## Task

### Files to create:

1. **`Models/Auth/LoginViewModel.cs`** — Email (Required, EmailAddress), Password (Required, MinLength 8), ReturnUrl
2. **`Models/Auth/LoginApiResponse.cs`** — record(Token, ExpiresAt, Email, Role)
3. **`Services/IAuthService.cs`** — LoginAsync, RegisterAsync
4. **`Services/AuthService.cs`** — calls backend `/auth/login` and `/auth/register`
5. **`Controllers/AuthController.cs`**
   - GET /auth/login → returns Login view
   - POST /auth/login → validate, call AuthService, create ClaimsIdentity with JWT token as claim, HttpContext.SignInAsync with cookie
   - POST /auth/logout → SignOutAsync → redirect home
6. **`Views/Auth/Login.cshtml`** — Bootstrap 5 card form, validation errors, link to register

### Rules:
- Parse JWT claims to extract UserId (sub claim)
- Store JWT token as a custom claim for API calls
- Use [ValidateAntiForgeryToken] on POST actions
- Verify build
- PR description must link back to this issue using GitHub closing keywords.
